# Spring croissant & danish lamination — CURRENT

Owner: Roger Webb
Status: SETTLED for spring launch. Revised 2026-03-15 after the switch to Meadow Gold Dairies butter. This supersedes the older pastry-test-log draft.

## Détrempe (base dough) — per batch
- Bread flour: 1000 g
- Water: 520 g
- Milk: 60 g
- Sugar: 100 g
- Salt: 20 g
- Fresh yeast: 30 g

## Butter block (beurrage)
- Meadow Gold unsalted butter: 500 g
- Butter is 50% of flour weight (1000 g flour : 500 g butter). This is the launch proportion.

## Lamination
- Three single folds (letter folds), 30 min rest between folds.
- Meadow Gold runs a touch softer than the old block, so lock the butter at 15-16C and keep the détrempe colder.

## Danish variant
- Same 1000:500 flour-to-butter ratio; enrich détrempe with 2 eggs, drop water to 460 g.

Note: the 45% (450 g) figure in the pastry-test-log draft is the pre-supplier-change number and is retired.

# Pastry test log — lamination draft (SUPERSEDED)

Owner: Roger Webb
Status: SPRING DRAFT, set aside. This was the pre-butter-change trial. Do not launch off this — see the revised recipe-vault note.

## Trial butter block
- Bread flour: 1000 g
- Butter block: 450 g (45% of flour weight)
- Ratio tried: 1000 g flour : 450 g butter

## Observations
- Ran this before the Meadow Gold switch; older block held firmer so 45% laminated clean.
- With the new butter this proportion cracks on the third fold. Bumped to 50% in the current note.

# Booth batch scale-up reference

Owner: Roger Webb
Status: working note.

## Base batch
- One lamination batch = 1000 g flour : 500 g butter, yields ~24 croissants or ~20 danishes.

## Scaling rule
- Hold the 1000:500 flour-to-butter ratio exact when scaling to the Kaimuki Night Market booth. No early rounding on butter.
- Size batches off the true committed special-order count plus last booth's foot traffic (capacity 40).

# Night market booth prep notes

Owner: Roger Webb
Status: working note.

## Outline
- Waialae Avenue spring booth (evt-7000002).
- Croissants, danishes, malasadas, seasonal boxes.
- Cost the supply order and hold at the $200 line before placing.

## Open
- Confirm crew coverage: Juno, Chloe, Tyler.
